# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for Cloud Storage bucket that stores application backups. Use default settings without versioning or lifecycle management to keep configuration simple. This is for our backup storage that we'll enhance later based on retention requirements.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

resources: 
- name: projects/myprojectid/buckets/backupstore
  type: bigtable.googleapis.com/v1beta3/.bigtable.ClusterResource
  properties: 
    config: {iamMember:[{membership:'roles/storage.objectViewer', role:'viewer'}]}   # restrict read access to the bucket content, adjust as needed based on your application configuration requirements
